item.title: Felt Pads That Help Protect Floors
item.description: That Practical Mom shares a simple way felt pads can help protect floors from everyday wear.

media:content.media:description: That Practical Mom shares a simple way felt pads can help protect floors from everyday wear.

item.title: A relatable mom moment from That Practical Mom
item.description: That Practical Mom shares a relatable everyday mom moment that many viewers may recognize.

item.title: That Practical Mom’s Pink Door Refresh
item.description: That Practical Mom shares a pink door update and a simple approach: try it first, then adjust as needed.

media:content.media:title: That Practical Mom’s Pink Door Refresh
media:content.media:description: That Practical Mom shares a pink door update and a simple approach: try it first, then adjust as needed.

item.title: Spa rolling towels for neat storage
item.description: That Practical Mom shows how spa rolling keeps towels compact and secure for beach bags or tidy linen closets.

media:content.media:title: Spa rolling towels for neat storage
media:content.media:description: That Practical Mom shows how spa rolling keeps towels compact and secure for beach bags or tidy linen closets.

item.title: Smart vertical storage for accessories
item.description: That Practical Mom shares a simple closet tip: use vertical space for leggings and bags to help keep drawers clear and mornings more efficient.

media:content.media:title: Smart vertical storage for accessories
media:content.media:description: That Practical Mom shares a simple closet tip: use vertical space for leggings and bags to help keep drawers clear and mornings more efficient.
